channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Blinken heads to last G7 meeting of Biden presidency with Ukraine and Mideast topping the agenda
item.description: Secretary of State Antony Blinken is leaving on a diplomatic trip to Europe that includes a meeting of foreign ministers from the leading industrialized nations that will focus on the wars in Ukraine and the Middle East.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Lee, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump picks Dr. Janette Nesheiwat as nation's next surgeon general
item.description: President-elect Trump has nominated Dr. Janette Nesheiwat as surgeon general, calling her a "fierce advocate and strong communicator for preventative medicine and public health.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: ICE Buffalo official takes shot at NY Gov Hochul after arrest of wanted illegal immigrant
item.description: Officials with Immigration and Customs Enforcement in Buffalo, New York, took a shot at New York Gov. Kathy Hochul's immigration policies while announcing the arrest of a wanted illegal migrant.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vance takes on a more visible transition role, working to boost Trump's most contentious picks
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After several weeks working mostly behind closed doors, Vice President-elect JD Vance returned to Capitol Hill this week in a new, more visible role: Helping Donald Trump try to get his most contentious Cabinet picks to confirmation in the Senate, where Vance has served for the las
item.dc:creator: JILL COLVIN and STEPHEN GROVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump encounters Senate GOP limits with failed Gaetz AG push
item.description: President-elect Trump's ill-fated nomination of former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) to run the Justice Department marked an early sign of his potential limits in moving his nominees and dealing with Senate Republicans, giving him less wiggle room to get his Cabinet in place.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ken Paxton can’t be deposed under oath in whistleblower lawsuit, Texas Supreme Court says
item.description: The attorney general has agreed not to contest a lawsuit brought by former employees accusing him of retaliation after they said he abused his office.
item.dc:creator: Texas Tribune, By Zach Despart, KPRC 2

item.title: New York judge calls off Trump hush money sentencing
item.description: President-elect Trump’s sentencing in his New York criminal case will not go forward as planned next week as his attorneys push to dismiss the prosecution following his election victory. Judge Juan Merchan, who oversees the trial proceedings, announced the adjournment in a letter Friday.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What to know about Pam Bondi, Trump's new pick for attorney general
item.description: Pam Bondi, the former Florida attorney general, is Donald Trump’s new pick to serve as U.S. attorney general.
item.dc:creator: Michelle L. Price And Colleen Long, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Gaetz withdraws as Trump's pick for attorney general
item.description: Matt Gaetz has withdrawn as President-elect Donald Trump’s pick for attorney general following scrutiny over a federal sex trafficking investigation. The Florida Republican made the announcement Thursday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Trump chooses TV doctor Mehmet Oz to lead Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump says he is nominating Dr. Mehmet Oz, who hosted a long-running television talk show, to lead the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, WFLA, NBC
